task_description: Build Phase 2 of J.A.R.V.I.S project: Unified Orchestrator with multi-agent and multi-provider architecture. Replace Phidata dependency with raw OpenAI SDK. Create new code in J.A.R.V.I.S_system/core/ subfolder without deleting old files.

verification.summary: All 20 files created and verified. py_compile passes on all .py files. All modules import cleanly. ModelRouter correctly classifies EASY/MEDIUM/HARD. ConversationMemory save/load works. File tools have workspace path restriction. Python executor runs in isolated mode. CoderAgent has 6 tools registered. Orchestrator task classification routes correctly. REPL starts and exits cleanly. Review issues fixed: separate retry budgets, workspace-bounded paths, classifier coherence, key validation, better memory truncation, robust tool parsing.

review.v2: APPROVED with 3 minor non-blocking suggestions for future improvement
